                    +--------------------------------------------+
                    |                                 Auth Flow  |
            success |                    submit                  |
+-------------+     |  +----------------+      +--------------+  |
|  Dashboard  |<----o--+  Authenticate  |<-----+  Login Form  |  |
+-------------+     |  +----------------+      +--------------+  |
                    |                                            |
                    |                                            |
                    +--------------------------------------------+
